---
title: "sociodemografiske_karakteristika_short"
subtitle: "`sociodemografiske_karakteristika_short`"
description: "sociodemografiske_karakteristika_short"
---

<!--
NEVER EDIT MANUALLY. This documentation was auto-generated by `seedcase-flower`.
If you want to edit the content, please make changes to the `datapackage.json` file.
-->

- Path: `resources/sociodemografiske_karakteristika_short/data.parquet`
- Primary key: (`event`)

| Name                                    | Title                                 | Type   | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|-----------------------------------------|---------------------------------------|--------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `event`                                 | The unique name of the event          | string | The unique name identifying the event when the form was filled in.                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `center`                                | Research center                       | string | The research center where the data item was recorded.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `socde_short_living_with_others`        | socde_short_living_with_others        | string | Participant lives with other people. Self-reported by participant. Week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `socde_short_living_with_partner`       | socde_short_living_with_partner       | string | Participant lives with partner. Self-reported by participant. Week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `socde_short_living_with_children_u16`  | socde_short_living_with_children_u16  | string | Participant lives with child or children under 16 years of age. Self-reported by participant. Week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `socde_short_living_with_others_16plus` | socde_short_living_with_others_16plus | string | Participant lives with other persons aged 16 years or older (not spouse, cohabiting partner, or significant other). Self-reported by participant. Week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                        |
| `socde_short_employment_status`         | socde_short_employment_status         | string | Participant's current employment status. Self-reported by participant. Week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `socde_short_employ_status_other`       | socde_short_employ_status_other       | string | If participant selected "other" .... Week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `socde_short_work_shift`                | socde_short_work_shift                | string | Usual time of day the participant works in their main occupation. Self-reported by participant. Sociodemographic questionnaire. Week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                                          |
| `socde_short_work_shift_other`          | socde_short_work_shift_other          | string | If participant selected "other" for usual time of day worked in main occupation, specify which. Self-reported by participant. Week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                                            |
| `socde_short_sport_activity`            | socde_short_sport_activity            | string | Participant currently engages in sports or physical activities either in a club or independently (e.g., running, ball games, fitness, gymnastics, powerwalking, dance, yoga). Do not include cycling as transportation or regular walking. Self-reported by participant. Week 52 (V10). |

: Fields in the `sociodemografiske_karakteristika_short` resource.
